sectionsUnavailable: Exact Thyroid Cancer detail/sample body extraction is not available yet; sibling Disease Risk Genetic Test Report cancer-category rows are used only as observed output structure.

Validated pathogenic-variant screen, calibrated cancer PRS, inherited-cancer panel scope, ancestry applicability metadata, family history, tumor testing, clinical screening history, prevention-plan context, clinician review, and genetic-counselor review are unavailable.

This result is not a diagnosis, personal cancer-risk estimate, carrier-status result, screening recommendation, prevention plan, medication recommendation, surgery recommendation, treatment instruction, or actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Thyroid Cancer cannot emit a personal risk estimate from this local fixture because the validated model inputs are unavailable.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This row is an availability statement, not a diagnosis, carrier-status result, risk score, screening recommendation, prevention plan, or treatment instruction.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Thyroid Cancer cannot interpret clinical context because symptoms, screening, family history, tumor testing, and clinician interpretation are unavailable.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Personal interpretation needs validated testing scope, clinical history, family history, screening context, ancestry applicability, and qualified professional review.

resultRows.item: Disease Risk sample Cancers category table
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sibling Disease Risk sample shows a Cancers category table with Disease, Your Risk, and Description columns; visible sample rows include bladder, brain, breast, BRCA1, BRCA2, colorectal, ovarian, pancreatic, prostate, renal, skin melanoma, skin non-melanoma, thyroid, and other cancer entries. The sibling Disease Risk sample includes a Thyroid row in its Cancers table; this is observed sibling sample structure only and not a local thyroid-cancer finding.
resultRows.sourceLabel: Sibling Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample report
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed sibling sample structure only; it is not local findings for thyroid cancer, carrier status, diagnosis, screening guidance, prevention advice, treatment guidance, or actionability.

conditionRiskContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Thyroid Cancer is currently a boundary report: it can document what evidence is available and what is missing, but it cannot estimate personal cancer risk or make health decisions.
unsupportedClaims: Personal cancer-risk estimate or calibrated PRS result
Screening, prevention, medication, surgery, treatment, or lifestyle instructions
Replacement for genetic counseling or clinician review
conditionRiskContext.professionalReview: Use a qualified clinician or genetic counselor for cancer-risk interpretation, especially when there is personal history, family history, symptoms, abnormal screening, or a known familial variant.

professionalReview: Do not use this local fixture to change screening, prevention, medication, surgery, or treatment decisions.
Bring family history, personal history, prior genetic testing, screening results, and ancestry context to a clinician or genetic counselor if reviewing cancer risk.
Treat missing model rows as unavailable, not as low risk or reassuring results.

validated thyroid cancer model, calibrated cancer PRS, pathogenic variant interpretation, inherited-cancer panel scope, ancestry applicability, family history, tumor testing, screening context, prevention context, and clinician or genetic-counselor review unavailable in this fixture
uncertainty: No calibrated cancer-risk, carrier-status, screening-benefit, prevention-benefit, or treatment-response probability model is supplied for this local package.
Cancer-related interpretation depends on test scope, variant classification, family history, clinical history, ancestry applicability, screening context, and qualified review.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.

The report is educational and does not provide diagnosis, personal risk estimation, carrier-status classification, screening advice, prevention advice, medication advice, surgery advice, treatment advice, or actionability.
The Disease Risk sample limitation and Cancers category table are sibling output-structure evidence only, not local findings for thyroid cancer.
Unavailable model rows should never be interpreted as low risk, no risk, or an all-clear result.

sampleRows.description: The sample uses lung cancer as an example, saying lung cancer is only 10% heritable and most cases are associated with lifestyle factors such as smoking.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample states that 'Your Risk' is only for the heritable component of the disease, and that environmental, lifestyle, and other non-heritable factors also affect overall susceptibility risk.
sampleRows.sourceBindingNote: Extracted from the public Sequencing.com Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample PDF; used here as sibling output-structure evidence for Thyroid Cancer, not as a direct Thyroid Cancer sample report or local findings for thyroid cancer, carrier-status, screening, prevention, diagnosis, treatment, or actionability guidance.
sampleRows.sourceLabel: Sibling Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample report

sampleRows.description: The sample table uses columns for Disease, Your Risk, and Description, with lifetime-risk and heritable-percentage text below many disease names.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Bladder Very Elevated; Brain Typical; Breast Typical; Breast BRCA1 Absent; Breast BRCA2 Absent; Cervical Male; Colorectal Typical; Endometrial Male; Esophageal visible with no cleanly extracted risk label; Liver Typical; Lung Very Reduced; Oral and Larynx visible with no cleanly extracted risk label; Ovarian Male; Pancreatic Reduced; Prostate Typical; Renal Typical; Skin Melanoma Reduced; Skin Non-melanoma Reduced; Testicular Typical; Thyroid Very Reduced.
